name: Patient Case
history: Recurrent stomachaches and physical symptoms associated with anxiety and stress. Past difficulties involving weight management, sexuality, and academic performance. Reports a transformation during college. Reports seeking control in relationships.
intermediate_belief: I must maintain control to avoid being vulnerable.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I lose control, I will return to being unhappy.
coping_strategies: Attempts to control relationships and situations to prevent feeling vulnerable.
situation: Concern about losing positive aspects of life or returning to a previous unhappy state.
auto_thought: I can't let things slip or I'll be unhappy again.
behavior: Seeks control in relationships and situations.
